# ANALYSIS: SNIPER V_pullback+chart-stop OOS Validation

**Filed:** 2026-06-01
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** OOS validation — existing combo validation
**Status:** IN PROGRESS — requires Stage-1 backtest run

## Hypothesis

The V_pullback+chart-stop combo (SNIPER entry on pullback to prior break level + chart-stop exit) was validated on a small "missed week + anchor window" sample. This analysis extends the validation to full OOS across 2026-01..2026-04 (where option fills are cached) to determine if the combo beats baseline premium-stop per-contract.

## Mechanism

**V_pullback definition:** Entry triggers when price pulls back to within $0.30 of a broken level (prior breakout point) and closes back through the level in the direction of the prior move.

**Chart-stop:** Exit when price closes back through the level from the wrong side (invalidates the pullback thesis).

**Baseline premium-stop:** Standard -8% premium stop (v14 params) for comparison.

## Data availability

| Window | Dates | Option fills cached | Coverage |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-01 | 1/2–1/31 | Yes (per task description) | Full |
| 2026-02 | 2/1–2/28 | Yes | Full |
| 2026-03 | 3/1–3/31 | Yes | Full |
| 2026-04 | 4/1–4/30 | Yes | Full |
| 2025 | Prior | Partial / not cached | Note coverage gaps |

## Required output metrics

1. **Days-green fraction:** What % of OOS days did V_pullback+chart-stop produce positive P&L per contract vs baseline?
2. **MISSED-MOVE COST:** How many signals did V_pullback skip that baseline premium-stop would have captured as winners?

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A — per-contract comparison
2. **Sample bias:** Small-N validation (missed week + anchor window) may not generalize
3. **Out-of-sample:** This IS the OOS validation — results TBD
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (OOS sim only, no OPRA cache validation yet)
5. **Failure modes:** If V_pullback filters too narrowly, missed-move cost could be high; if chart-stop exits too early, could underperform premium-stop
6. **Concentration:** Unknown until OOS run completes

## Next steps

1. Run `backtest/run.py` or `simulate_day` across 2026-01..2026-04 with V_pullback+chart-stop combo
2. Compare per-contract P&L vs baseline premium-stop
3. Compute days-green fraction and missed-move cost
4. Report results in follow-up analysis
